rationale: P140 proved that additional bounded engineering can materially improve metrics. Before freezing the manuscript, run a second-wave rescue focused on validation, artifact materialization, and higher-leverage model/postprocess improvements.

current_best_facts.room_p141: Best box F1 remains 0.370752; high-center variant reaches center 0.922099 but inflation 4.977742.
current_best_facts.relation_p142: Expected-json F1 1.0, but best model-output contains-symbol F1 0.036225.
current_best_facts.selector_p143: No all-gate selector rescue from P124 top rows.

second_wave_lanes.name: materialize_and_validate_p140_symbol_policy
second_wave_lanes.goal: Turn the P140 post-hoc best policy into an actual prediction artifact and rerun the official P101-style evaluator to verify F1 0.525029/inflation 1.055024 outside the sweep script.
second_wave_lanes.why: P140 is now the strongest metric. It must be materialized and independently evaluated before becoming a main paper table result.
second_wave_lanes.target: official-eval F1 >=0.50 and inflation <=1.20 on the same 74-row subset
second_wave_lanes.stop_gate: If official evaluator disagrees by >0.02 F1, debug schema/matching before manuscript update.

second_wave_lanes.name: symbol_policy_generalization_check
second_wave_lanes.goal: Check whether the P140 operating point generalizes beyond the 74-row overlay subset using any available P116/P119 subset/full prediction artifacts.
second_wave_lanes.why: P140 may be overfit to the 74-row subset; a small independent/subset check greatly improves paper credibility.
second_wave_lanes.target: Maintain lower inflation and no catastrophic F1 drop on an available non-identical subset; exact target depends on available artifacts.
second_wave_lanes.stop_gate: If no compatible predictions exist, write an explicit generalization gap and do not overclaim P140.

second_wave_lanes.name: room_postprocess_fast_native_sweep
second_wave_lanes.goal: Move P141 room sweep off slow mounted IO by pre-materializing masks or running on remote/local temp storage, then complete a real postprocess grid.
second_wave_lanes.why: P141 was inconclusive because IO was too slow. Room is likely postprocess-limited and still worth rescuing.
second_wave_lanes.target: space box F1 >=0.45 or center >=0.85 with inflation <=2.5
second_wave_lanes.stop_gate: Stop if best F1 remains <=0.38 after a real grid; keep as diagnostic.

second_wave_lanes.name: combine_p140_symbol_with_relation_smoke
second_wave_lanes.goal: If feasible, rerun/approximate contains-symbol relation smoke using cleaner P140 symbol candidates to test whether relation model-output F1 improves.
second_wave_lanes.why: P142 relation failure is likely upstream symbol/room noise; P140 cleaner symbols may reduce relation overproduction.
second_wave_lanes.target: Any clear model-output contains-symbol F1 improvement over 0.036225; stretch >=0.10
second_wave_lanes.stop_gate: If schemas do not join quickly, write protocol and defer.

second_wave_lanes.name: selector_exact_evaluator_offmount
second_wave_lanes.goal: Rerun exact selector evaluator on copied local/off-mount dev files with a finer budget grid, instead of relying only on P124 top_rows.
second_wave_lanes.why: P143 used existing top rows because full join was slow. A local/off-mount run may find pass-all budget settings.
second_wave_lanes.target: Pass center/tiny/inflation gates simultaneously, or prove no pass-all in a richer grid.
second_wave_lanes.stop_gate: Stop after bounded grid if no pass-all; preserve negative result.

second_wave_lanes.name: text_ocr_external_option_audit
second_wave_lanes.goal: Check whether any existing OCR/text artifacts can provide a nonzero text result; otherwise formalize text as out-of-scope negative evidence.
second_wave_lanes.why: Text F1 is 0.0 and drags perceived completeness; a small OCR smoke could help, but should not block main paper.
second_wave_lanes.target: Nonzero text recall smoke if existing OCR outputs exist; otherwise clean limitation.
second_wave_lanes.stop_gate: No new OCR training before main metric rescues are done.

execution_order: P148C real room native/off-mount postprocess sweep
P148D relation smoke with cleaner P140 symbols if schema feasible
P154 manuscript v0.5 only after second-wave decisions
paper_policy: Keep manuscript v0.4 as safe baseline. Do not update main tables again until P148A validates P140 and at least one of P148B/P148C/P148E completes.
risk_controls: Every second-wave metric must have an official or clearly labeled evaluator.
Do not silently change evaluation target definitions.
Separate materialized policy results from post-hoc sweep diagnostics.
Prefer local/off-mount temp copies for large IO sweeps.
